description: Allows overwriting arbitrary .py files outside the workspace, potentially leading to code execution on the host system.
remediation: Patched in v0.4.3. Workaround: run in VM.

description: Allows remote code execution if untrusted users can reach the POST /api/v1/custom_component endpoint and provide a Python script.

vulnerability_type: OS Command Injection / Unauthorized File Read and Network Exfiltration
description: Permissive default allowlist enables unauthorized file read and network exfiltration without user confirmation.
remediation: Patched in v1.0.4. Auto-updated for users on standard Claude Code. Versions prior to 1.0.24 are deprecated.

vulnerability_type: Arbitrary Local File Read / Path Traversal
description: Reads files without path validation, enabling access to files on the server.
